generator: openai/gpt-image-2/edit via FAL; no post-processing; low quality
creative_goal: Completely new artistic visual graphics from Aion's own idea; first slide must feature PROMPT in the graphic style; final slide must mention GenLabs in same typography/world.
visual_world: Bangkok Receipt Ghosts / Thai-modern thermal receipt night-market commerce poster
master_prompt: BANGKOK RECEIPT GHOSTS: Thai-modern night-market commerce/poster campaign where PROMPT is built from torn thermal receipt strips, black ink bloom, barcode and QR fragments, smoky street-food steam, translucent plastic-bag material, chrome sauce droplets, orange-green neon, and wet asphalt reflections. Explore the same world through hero seller/product scene, macro ink/steam texture, deconstructed commerce poster, rainy night-market atmosphere, prompt recipe card, and GenLabs final slide.

slides.prompt:
Create ONE square 1:1 image for a GenLabs Prompt Drop carousel.
Use the attached references only for overall prompt-gallery energy: bold, stylish, editorial, social-feed-worthy, artistic, strong typography integration. Do not copy exact people, layouts, logos, faces, or existing words.

Visual world: BANGKOK RECEIPT GHOSTS — a Thai-modern night-market commerce/poster world built from thermal receipt paper, black ink bloom, LINE-order style message fragments without readable UI, QR-code texture fragments, smoky street-food steam, plastic bag translucency, chrome sauce reflections, orange-green neon, rain on asphalt, and ghostly product silhouettes.

The style must feel unique and prompt-worthy, not generic food photography or generic cyberpunk. Think experimental album cover + Thai seller receipt + night market poster + cinematic macro materials. Thai localization should be contemporary and commercial, not touristy: no temples, tuk-tuks, flags, elephants, tourist costumes, or fake readable Thai signs.

Typography must be generated inside the image and must match the receipt/poster world. No ugly pasted text. Avoid dense text. No watermark. No random brand names.

Slide 1 / Main cover. The word PROMPT is the hero typography, physically formed from torn thermal receipt strips, black ink bloom, barcode fragments, QR-code texture, neon orange-green edge glow, and wet asphalt reflections. Around it: ghostly silhouettes of Thai street-food packaging, plastic bags, steam, sauce chrome, and night-market rain. Layout like a premium Instagram prompt cover: bold, clean, artistic, high contrast. The text must read exactly: PROMPT. Make this the strongest, most correct image of the carousel.
